overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk along a hazy city sidewalk lined with illuminated vending machines. The player character walks past the machines, passes a pedestrian in a yellow jacket, and tilts the camera up to view a massive futuristic megabuilding in a neon-lit urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past green vending machines and palm trees in a hazy neon-lit environment

entered.detail: illuminated green vending machine with 'BURRITO XXL' signage displaying food items
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk
chain-link fence running along the left side of the sidewalk
tall street lamp casting light through the haze
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street ahead
massive futuristic skyscraper looming in the hazy distance
metal trash can next to the vending machines

segments.scene_description: Walking along a hazy nighttime sidewalk lined with illuminated green vending machines selling burritos. Palm trees and a metal fence line the path while distant skyscrapers loom in the fog, and street lamps cast a diffuse glow through the haze.

events.description: pedestrian in yellow jacket becomes visible walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past red and black vending machines while approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket and teal pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red illuminated vending machine with product displays
black vending machine with yellow signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing past red and black vending machines while approaching a pedestrian in a yellow jacket walking ahead. The sidewalk leads toward an overpass structure with the megabuilding becoming more defined in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street view looking up at megabuilding

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the massive skyscraper against the night sky

agents.ego_description: having passed the pedestrian, stopping to look up at the towering megabuilding

entered.detail: building with large illuminated '07' sign on the facade

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pedestrian and vending machines, the camera tilts dramatically upward to showcase the towering megabuilding against the hazy night sky. The building with the illuminated '07' sign becomes visible on the left as the view opens up to reveal the full scale of the futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a hazy nighttime sidewalk that culminates in a dramatic reveal of a towering futuristic megabuilding. It begins by gliding past a row of illuminated green burrito vending machines, with palm trees and a metal fence lining a path shrouded in a diffuse, foggy glow. As the camera continues forward, the vending machines shift to red and black tones and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket appears ahead, leading the view toward a distant overpass. The scene then opens up as the camera passes the pedestrian, tilting sharply upward to transition from the street-level haze to the immense scale of the urban architecture. Finally, the view settles on the massive megabuilding against the night sky, highlighting a glowing 07 sign on the left.
